error_auth_account_not_activated: Account has not been activated yet.
error_auth_invalid_activation_token: Activation token is invalid or expired.
error_erp_activity_in_use: Cannot delete activity that is assigned to working hours entries.
error_erp_working_hours_locked: Cannot modify locked working hours entry.
error_erp_working_hours_already_locked: Working hours entry is already locked.
error_erp_working_hours_not_owned: You can only access your own working hours.
error_erp_wallet_already_exists: Wallet already exists for this employee.
error_erp_wallet_insufficient_balance: Insufficient wallet balance for this debit.
error_erp_wallet_not_owned: You can only access your own wallet.
error_journey_cannot_start: Journey cannot be started from its current status.
error_journey_not_modifiable: Journey can only be modified while in PLANNED or AWAITING_LOADING status.
error_journey_not_planned: Journey must be in PLANNED status for this operation.
error_journey_order_already_assigned: Order is already assigned to this stop.
error_journey_order_not_assigned: Order is not assigned to this stop.
error_journey_missing_driver: Journey requires at least one crew member with DRIVER role.
error_journey_missing_rsr: Journey requires at least one crew member with RSR role.
error_journey_crew_missing_permission: Crew member lacks a required permission.
error_route_archived_cannot_modify: Route is archived and cannot be modified.
error_vehicle_vin_already_exists: Vehicle with this VIN already exists.
error_vehicle_license_plate_already_exis: Vehicle with this license plate already exists.
error_employee_duplicate_email: An active employee with this email already exists.
error_employee_duplicate_phone: An active employee with this phone already exists.
error_employee_position_already_assigned: Position is already assigned to this employee.
error_employee_position_not_assigned: Position is not assigned to this employee.
error_employee_already_linked_to_user: Employee is already linked to a user.
error_employee_unknown_permission: Permission does not exist in the system.
error_position_key_already_exists: Position with this key already exists.
error_availability_not_pending: Availability entry is not pending approval.
error_availability_not_owned: You can only manage your own availability.
error_availability_locked: Availability is locked because the time has already started.
error_availability_date_passed: Cannot modify availability for past dates.
error_order_orderline_without_items: Order has order lines without items.
error_order_orderline_price_not_found: Could not resolve a price for order line.
error_order_quantity_edit_forbidden: Cannot edit quantity of placed order.
error_order_place_forbidden: Order can only be placed from DRAFTED status.
error_order_cancel_forbidden: Order can only be cancelled from DRAFTED or PLACED status.
error_order_orderline_not_found: Order line not found for the given product.
error_order_complete_forbidden: Order can only be completed from PLACED or IN_PROGRESS status.
error_order_stock_entry_already_assigned: Stock entry is already assigned to another active order.
error_order_stock_entry_good_mismatch: Stock entry's good does not match the order line's assigned good.
error_order_orderline_no_good: Order line must have a good assigned before a stock entry can be assigned.
error_order_stock_entry_assign_forbidden: Stock entries can only be assigned to PLACED orders.
error_system_user_cannot_remove_own_admi: Administrator cannot remove the administrator role from themselves.
error_system_user_duplicate_email: System user with this email already exists.
error_system_user_last_active_admin: Cannot remove the last active administrator from the system.
error_code_value_already_exists: Code with this value already exists.
error_good_incorporated_cannot_edit: Incorporated good cannot be edited while it has a parent.
error_good_has_active_stock: Cannot delete good because it has active stock entries.
error_goods_receipt_not_draft: Goods receipt can only be modified while in DRAFT status.
error_goods_receipt_no_lines: Cannot confirm a goods receipt with no lines.
error_sector_not_in_warehouse: Sector does not belong to this warehouse.
error_warehouse_has_stock: Cannot deactivate warehouse because it still contains stock.
error_stock_entry_not_empty: Cannot delete stock entry because it still has quantity.
error_stock_transfer_request_not_pending: Stock transfer request can only be fulfilled, cancelled, or rejected while in PENDING status.
permission_erp_manage_working_hours_desc: View, edit, and lock working hours for any employee
permission_hr_manage_availability_desc: Confirm/reject availability and set availability without approval
